Package com.pdfjet

Class BigTable

java.lang.Object
com.pdfjet.BigTable
public class BigTable extends Object
Use this class if you have a lot of data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    BigTable(PDF pdf, Font f1, Font f2, float[] pageSize)
    Creates a table and sets the fonts and page size.

  • Constructor Details

    • BigTable

      public BigTable(PDF pdf, Font f1, Font f2, float[] pageSize)
      Creates a table and sets the fonts and page size.
      Parameters:
      pdf - the font.
      f1 - the header font.
      f2 - the the body font.
      pageSize - specifies the page size.

  • Method Details

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(float x, float y)
      Sets the location where this table will be drawn on the page.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate of the top left corner of the table box.
      y - the y coordinate of the top left corner of the table box.

    • setNumberOfColumns

      public void setNumberOfColumns(int numberOfColumns)

    • setTextAlignment

      public void setTextAlignment(int column, Alignment alignment)
      Sets the text alignment in the specified column.
      Parameters:
      column - the column.
      align - the alignment.

    • setBottomMargin

      public void setBottomMargin(float bottomMargin)
      Sets the bottom margin.
      Parameters:
      bottomMargin - the bottom margin.

    • setLanguage

      public void setLanguage(String language)
      Sets the language.
      Parameters:
      language - the language.

    • getPages

      public List<Page> getPages()
      Returns the pages.
      Returns:
      the pages.

    • setTableData

      public void setTableData(String fileName, String delimiter) throws IOException
      Sets the column widths, the column alignment and header fields.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the file name.
      Throws:
      IOException - if there is an issue.

    • complete

      public void complete() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception
